关于About this game

A focused pinyin trainer for adult learners of Mandarin. It complements the Fortune Channels · 汉语词汇启蒙 vocabulary game by zooming in on the building blocks of pronunciation — the initials, finals, and tones.

How to use it: pick a tab, tap any item to see its standard pronunciation, an English tip, and example words drawn from the 150-word core vocabulary. Adjust the playback speed (0.6× / 0.8× / 1.0×) to your level. When you're ready, tap 🎙 Practice, allow microphone access, and read the syllable aloud. Your browser will tell you what it heard.

What the recogniser checks: only the initial + final of your syllable. It does not check tones — browser speech recognition cannot reliably analyse pitch contour. That's what the Tones tab is for: listening, comparing, and shadowing.

If recognition fails: tap 🎙 again to retry, or tap Skip → to move on. No locking, no penalty — Duolingo doesn't lock you either, and neither will we.

Tip · 小提示
For best results use Chrome, Edge, or Safari (iOS/macOS) with a working microphone. Allow microphone access when prompted. If recognition is unreliable, try a quieter room or move closer to the mic.
